title: [codereview-pass1.2 robustness] spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md: TDMA retry recursion may stack overflow on persistent collision; use loop instead
close_reason: Updated spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md pseudocode: replaced TDMA retry recursion with iterative transmit_with_retry loop + backoff to prevent stack overflow on persistent collisions. Updated implementation notes. 3 codereview passes clean, no new beads. Matches robustness requirement.
